# SecPolicyCopyProperties(_:)

**Function**

Returns a dictionary containing a policy’s properties.

## Declaration

```swift
func SecPolicyCopyProperties(_ policyRef: SecPolicy) -> CFDictionary?
```

## Parameters

- **policyRef**: The policy from which properties should be copied.

## Return Value

A dictionary with the policy’s properties. See [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/security-policy-keys] for a list of valid keys. In Objective-C, call the [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFRelease] function to free the dictionary’s memory when you are done with it.
title: SecPolicyCopyProperties(_:)
